german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Dominant Requirement
german_requirement.subtitle: Nearly half of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core and Technical PMs Hold Equal Influence
pm_type.subtitle: A balanced pattern reveals no significant dominance between Core and Technical PM roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: With 58% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, limiting flexibility for remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: 40% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
